fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

<see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> provides the metadata for one variation axis in a variable font, including its tag (e.g., `'wght'` for weight), its minimum, default, and maximum values, and whether it should be hidden from UI.

## Examples

```csharp
var axes = typeface.VariationDesignParameters;
foreach (var axis in axes)
{
    Console.WriteLine($"{axis.Tag}: {axis.Min} .. {axis.Default} .. {axis.Max}");
}
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Describes a single variation axis of a variable font.

fields.value: The default value for this axis when no explicit position is specified.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the default value for this variation axis.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the specified value is equal to the current instance; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> is equal to the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="obj" /> is a <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> and equals the current instance; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current instance.

entries.signature: public override readonly bool Equals (object obj);

fields.returns: A hash code for the current instance.
fields.summary: Returns the hash code for the current instance.

fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if this axis is hidden; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this variation axis should be hidden from user interfaces.

fields.value: The maximum value allowed for this axis.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the maximum value for this variation axis.

fields.value: The minimum value allowed for this axis.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the minimum value for this variation axis.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the two instances are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> instances are equal.

fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> instances are not equal.

entries.signature: public static bool operator != (SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis left, SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis right);

fields.value: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> for this axis (e.g., <c>'wght'</c> for weight).
fields.summary: Gets or sets the four-byte tag identifying this variation axis.
